# tests/fixtures/

## Overview
Reserved directory for committed harness-only test fixtures when monorepo sibling repos are unavailable.

## File & Submodule Index

| Path | Role | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| _(empty)_ | — | Diagnostic i18n JSON ships in `src/.../i18n/locales/`; override in tests via `MYRM_LOCALES_DIR` |

## Key Dependencies

- None currently; extend when a harness-only fixture is needed
